description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a striking geometric design, featuring a mix of stone, wood, and white plaster exterior finishes. The front facade showcases large floor-to-ceiling windows and a spacious deck area with built-in seating and a grill, ideal for outdoor gatherings. The upper level includes a balcony with glass railings and outdoor furniture, as well as a rooftop garden area with green patches. The house has multiple entry points, including a main door beneath a covered section and secondary access from the deck. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with expansive glass panels providing ample natural light to the interior. The landscaping includes manicured grass, shrubs, and decorative planters, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, stone and wood accents, and spacious outdoor decks and balconies.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, a stone facade, and a spacious deck with built-in seating and grill.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the upper balcony with glass railings, rooftop garden, and a clear view of the deck and entryway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balcony, additional green space, and the continuation of the modern geometric design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the layered structure, stone and wood finishes, and a secondary green area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway beneath a covered section, featuring a modern door, stone surround, and adjacent deck with built-in seating.
